titleStmt.title: SII 23.573: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 573. (A.R. No. 573 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 4th tier of the south base

summary.p: This is built in at the beginning and is also incomplete. In the body of the inscription is mentioned the 8th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa with details of date Kumbha, ba. 14, Friday, Śrāvaṇa, Śivarātri corresponding to A.D. 1141, February 7. The nakshatra was of the previous day when it ended at ·88 of that day.

On this date Madhurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa Siddharasaṉ is stated to have granted house-sites and lands to 52 Brāhmaṇas and a flower garden (for the temple). With this is found a two line piece of a different inscription dated in Virōdhikṛit year, recording some gift (of money) to the temple at Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by a certain Malaikiniyaniṉṟāṉ Ādinādaṉ of Ōymā-nāḍu to secure for himself ‘long life, health and prosperity’.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kuḷḷa ṉila tirunandavanamum nāyakatte Ittirunandavanamāka tom Ūṟkku vaṭakiḻakkil coṇṭakaṉ tiruna
kāṅkoḷi raiyum vaṭakkut teruvil teṉciṟakil brāhmaṇa rellaikku meṟku Ikkālattil brāhmaṇaṟ kiṭṭa maṉaikkuk kiḻakku naṭuvuḷḷa maṉaikaḷum vaṭaciṟakil vatikku meṟku
Aiympattiruvarum kaiyyolaippaṭiyāṟ peṟṟuṭaiya nilamuṭ paṭa Ivvellai nāṟpāluḷḷukkum naṭu melnokkiya maramuṅ kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum
Akappaṭa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu kumbha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattuc caturdaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum tiru voṇamumāṉa civarāttirināḷ Ippo
sommāka Iṭṭukkoḷḷa dharmmadānam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Ivvūr nāṟpālellaikkuṭpaṭṭa koyilkaḷ Ellā n=taṅkaḷ col paṭi ceyyakkaṭa
māka Ivaimpattiruvaṟkku dharmmadānam paṇṇik kal veṭṭik kuṭutten maturān=takap pottappic coḻaṉ siddharasaṉeṉ Ippaṭi melum celuttātār
maṉaiyppeṟkkuṭi periāḻvāṉ Oppu Itup pe rājen=tirattu trailokkiya cakkaravatti viṣaiya ceStops here.

—āvutāna virodhikrat samvatsarattu taimāsa madhirājendra maṇṭa lattu meṟpākkaiṉāṭṭu nirantanūrāna Akarabrahmadeyam śrīkulot tuṅkacoḻac catuppetimaṅkalattuk kulo
—maṇṭalattu Oymānāṭṭup perāyakku ṅkiḻāṉ malaikiniya niṉṟān Ātinātanen Inakku Āyurārogyaiśvaryaādi�sarvasampatsamṛddhi yuṇṭāka Ikkoyilil cipaṇṭārattiṟ poliyūṭṭākak ku
Digital edition of SII 23.573 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
